summary: Script is well-written (Set-StrictMode, error handling, modular functions). Workflow structure reasonable but incomplete: missing test fixture data (fixtures/feat|fix|breaking/* directories containing version files and commits.txt) that workflow matrix expects, blocking execution. Action checkout@v4 not SHA-pinned (best practice). Verbose output formatting in workflow (lines 43–57) could move to script. Critical requirement 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' unsatisfiable without fixtures; actionlint/act validation impossible; act-result.txt artifact cannot exist. Deliverable non-functional.
